title: nacag #5253
definition:
1) to move away, backslide, move, go, turn back
    1a) (Qal) to backslide, prove recreant to
    1b) (Hiphil)
        1b1) to displace, move back
        1b2) to remove, carry away
    1d) (Hophal) to be driven back, be moved back
